prestazioni: Engine swap to a **4ZC1-T** (1.8L turbocharged inline-4, 135 PS stock) with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbocharger, custom 264°/260° camshafts from **Toda Racing**, and a **HKS Super SQV IV** blow-off valve for optimized spool and response

Full **Tomei 4-2-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold** paired with a **Sard 76mm titanium exhaust system** (cat-back) and a **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller for 1.2 bar peak pressure on 98 RON fuel

Custom **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with **ID1000x injectors**, **Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump**, and a **Nismo 550cc/min intercooler** (modified for the ZZ-R’s front-mount position) to support 280+ WHP on E85
Strengthened drivetrain with a **PPG 6-speed dog engagement gearset** (close-ratio), **OS Giken Super Lock LSD**, and **Nismo carbon driveshaft** to handle increased torque
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Gemini ZZ-R widebody kit** (fiberglass, 30mm extended fenders front/rear) with **Volk Racing TE37SL 15x9 +15** wheels (185/55R15 Yokohama AD08R tires) and **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (10kg/mm front, 8kg/mm rear springs)
**Seibon carbon fiber hood** (custom vented for intercooler clearance) and **JDM Isuzu Gemini ZZ-R OEM-style rear wing** (polyurethane, 30mm taller than stock) with **Aero Catch hood pins**

**Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats** (JDM-spec, 3-point harness compatible) wrapped in **Alcantara/red stitching**, paired with a **Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel** and **Defi BF gauges** (oil pressure, boost, EGT) in a **custom A-pillar pod**
